{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/159286161?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/vnth4nhnt", "id": 159286161, "login": "vnth4nhnt", "node_id": "U_kgDOCX6DkQ", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-54324", "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-639", "name": "Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "### Summary
A cross-tenant authorization flaw in Daytona's notification WebSocket gateway allowed any authenticated user to subscribe to another organization's realtime notification channel and passively receive that organization's events.

### Impact
The notification gateway's JWT handshake joined a client-supplied organization identifier to the corresponding notification room without verifying that the authenticated user was a member of that organization. As a result, an authenticated user could receive another organization's realtime sandbox, snapshot, volume, and runner events, including data carried in those events. This is a cross-tenant confidentiality break. It required a valid account and knowledge of the target organization id (a non-secret UUID); no elevated privileges were needed. The API-key authentication path was not affected.

The affected component is the Daytona API service (the `apps/api` NestJS application). It is distributed through Daytona's repository releases and container images for self-hosted deployments; it is not published as a Go or npm package, so the advisory will not surface through `go get` or npm dependency tooling.

### Affected Versions
>= 0.101.0, <= 0.184.0

### Patched Versions
0.185.0

### Credit
@vnth4nhnt from CyStack", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00275, "percentile": 0.19043}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qwxf-2m7m-2m3x", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-17T18:07:30Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qwxf-2m7m-2m3x", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qwxf-2m7m-2m3x"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54324"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-17T18:07:30Z", "references": ["https://github.com/daytonaio/daytona/security/advisories/GHSA-qwxf-2m7m-2m3x", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qwxf-2m7m-2m3x"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/daytonaio/daytona/security-advisories/GHSA-qwxf-2m7m-2m3x", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/daytonaio/daytona", "summary": "Daytona: Cross-tenant data leak in notification WebSocket gateway via unverified organizationId join", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-17T18:07:30Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qwxf-2m7m-2m3x", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.185.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/daytonaio/daytona"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.184.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Daytona: Cross-tenant data leak in notification WebSocket gateway via unverified organizationId join
